{
  "title": "龙影元宇宙多模态智能数据手套",
  "slideCount": 26,
  "slides": [
    {
      "index": 1,
      "title": "龙影元宇宙多模态智能数据手套",
      "subtitle": "赋能元宇宙产业落地",
      "layout": "cover",
      "contentHint": "项目基于政策驱动与市场需求，研发高精度多模态交互手套，突破自然交互瓶颈。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [],
      "speakerNotes": "欢迎词和项目概述。"
    },
    {
      "index": 2,
      "title": "项目背景",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "介绍元宇宙交互瓶颈与政策驱动。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [0],
      "speakerNotes": "引出项目必要性。"
    },
    {
      "index": 3,
      "title": "元宇宙交互瓶颈与产业现状",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "comparison",
      "contentHint": "政策驱动下，产业规模目标3500亿元，但交互环节存在自然交互能力薄弱等痛点。",
      "imageHint": "VR发展现状",
      "imageIndex": 0,
      "refChunks": [0, 1],
      "speakerNotes": "详细解释政策和产业现状。"
    },
    {
      "index": 4,
      "title": "产业调研与核心瓶颈",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "cards-3",
      "contentHint": "通过实地调研，识别出低成本传感器、算法框架、生态适配三重瓶颈。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [2],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍调研过程和发现。"
    },
    {
      "index": 5,
      "title": "创新基础",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "团队背景与技术创新积淀。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [3],
      "speakerNotes": "过渡到创新部分。"
    },
    {
      "index": 6,
      "title": "团队实力与技术现状",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "comparison",
      "contentHint": "团队具备全链条跨学科能力，同时柔性传感器和手势识别领域存在挑战与机遇。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [3, 4],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍团队背景和技术领域现状。"
    },
    {
      "index": 7,
      "title": "创新设计",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "系统开展数据手套的创新设计。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [5],
      "speakerNotes": "引入创新设计部分。"
    },
    {
      "index": 8,
      "title": "创新设计与技术系统",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "image-text",
      "contentHint": "基于仿生结构构建混合传感架构，并实现“感知-意图-反馈”闭环交互系统。",
      "imageHint": "技术框架图",
      "imageIndex": 1,
      "refChunks": [5, 6],
      "speakerNotes": "详细解释创新设计和技术系统。"
    },
    {
      "index": 9,
      "title": "创新成果",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "知识产权与学术成果。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [7],
      "speakerNotes": "展示成果。"
    },
    {
      "index": 10,
      "title": "学术成果与产业验证",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "comparison",
      "contentHint": "累计发表论文9篇，并成功应用于中航光电虚拟装配培训，效果显著。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [7, 8],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍成果和验证案例。"
    },
    {
      "index": 11,
      "title": "专家评价",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "行业专家对项目的肯定。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [9],
      "speakerNotes": "引入专家评价。"
    },
    {
      "index": 12,
      "title": "专家评价",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "quote-no-avatar",
      "contentHint": "陈建国院士和李明霞教授高度评价项目的创新性和战略价值。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [9],
      "speakerNotes": "宣读专家评价。"
    },
    {
      "index": 13,
      "title": "市场与财务规划",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "市场分析、商业模式与财务展望。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [10],
      "speakerNotes": "过渡到市场部分。"
    },
    {
      "index": 14,
      "title": "市场分析与定位",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "list-featured",
      "contentHint": "产业规模目标3500亿元，精准锚定高端制造、国防科研、高校实训三大赛道，产品具备四大核心优势。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [10, 11],
      "speakerNotes": "分析市场潜力和产品定位。"
    },
    {
      "index": 15,
      "title": "推广模式",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "milestone-list",
      "contentHint": "通过灯塔验证构建销售闭环，并拓展生态合作，实现规模化复制。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [12],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍推广策略。"
    },
    {
      "index": 16,
      "title": "商业模式与财务规划",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "comparison",
      "contentHint": "构建“高校-客户-伙伴”三元网络，并设定里程碑驱动预算规划。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [13, 14],
      "speakerNotes": "解释商业模式和财务计划。"
    },
    {
      "index": 17,
      "title": "盈利分析与落地前景",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "comparison",
      "contentHint": "盈利结构硬件占60%，软件服务占40%，并遵循“灯塔验证—生态筑基—分阶推广”三步走路径。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [15, 16],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍盈利模式和未来计划。"
    },
    {
      "index": 18,
      "title": "社会影响",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "项目对就业和社会文明的贡献。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [17],
      "speakerNotes": "过渡到社会影响。"
    },
    {
      "index": 19,
      "title": "社会影响",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "metrics",
      "contentHint": "项目将创造1000个高质量就业岗位，间接带动2000个岗位，并赋能技能传承与社会协同。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [17],
      "speakerNotes": "阐述社会价值。"
    },
    {
      "index": 20,
      "title": "团队建设",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "团队结构与专家支持。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [18],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍团队。"
    },
    {
      "index": 21,
      "title": "团队精神与结构",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "comparison",
      "contentHint": "扎根哈工大校训，构建“核心引领、模块协同”的扁平化架构。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [18, 19],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍团队文化和结构。"
    },
    {
      "index": 22,
      "title": "指导教师与外部专家",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "cards-2",
      "contentHint": "张展教授和娄久教授提供技术指导，赵建国教授和周敏总经理提供学术与产业支持。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [20, 21],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍专家团队。"
    },
    {
      "index": 23,
      "title": "教育支持",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "section-header",
      "contentHint": "学校育人体系与双创支持。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [22],
      "speakerNotes": "过渡到教育支持。"
    },
    {
      "index": 24,
      "title": "四新建设与双创支持",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "cards-split",
      "contentHint": "哈工大构建“基础融通—前沿聚焦—产教协同”育人体系，并提供跨学科双创教育支撑。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [22, 23],
      "speakerNotes": "介绍学校支持。"
    },
    {
      "index": 25,
      "title": "产教科教协同",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "text-center",
      "contentHint": "依托国家级平台，推行“校内导师+企业工程师”双指导制，开展项目制实训。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [24],
      "speakerNotes": "总结教育协同。"
    },
    {
      "index": 26,
      "title": "谢谢",
      "subtitle": "",
      "layout": "ending",
      "contentHint": "感谢聆听，期待合作。",
      "imageHint": "",
      "imageIndex": -1,
      "refChunks": [],
      "speakerNotes": "结束语。"
    }
  ]
}
